motifs.name: rice_spirit
motifs.description: Spirit of rice, central to Khamu agriculture

motifs.name: ancient_diamond
motifs.description: Ancient diamond motif predating external influences

motifs.name: bronze_drumsound
motifs.description: Concentric circles echoing the surface decoration of Khamu bronze drums used in ceremonial music

motifs.name: matriline_chain
motifs.description: Linked chain pattern representing the matrilocal lineage where women hold the household inheritance

motifs.name: gong_face
motifs.description: Circular gong pattern reflecting the Khamu tradition of bronze gongs in spirit ceremonies

motifs.name: mountain_terrace
motifs.description: Stepped terrace pattern from the Khamu practice of mountain swidden farming on steep slopes
